art_market.summary: March 22, 2026, marks a significant transition in Seoul's art calendar with numerous major exhibitions concluding today.
closing_today: My Very Favorite - Thousand-Character Classic (Seoul Calligraphy Art Museum)
Klimt and Ricci Oddi Miracle (The My Art Museum)
Artist Research: Unfinished Flora & Time Blooms (SeMA)
ongoing: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center (until June 28)
Form into Color by March Avery at Esther Schipper (until April 25)
Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul (Ongoing)

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,781.2 on Friday, March 20, 2026. The market is currently experiencing high volatility following recent geopolitical events and record fluctuations in early March.

key_indicators.Market_Sentiment: Cautious; lingering concerns over volatility and valuation.
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Geopolitical risks, foreign vs. retail investor divergence, and semiconductor sector performance.
key_indicators.Outlook: Market focus remains on navigating volatility while assessing long-term valuation sustainability.
